    B

    barraTipos - Variable in class controller.CapturaController
     
    BASICO - Enum constant in enum class model.Rareza
     
    bd - package bd
     
    BICHO - Enum constant in enum class model.Tipos

    botonCambiarHembra - Variable in class controller.CrianzaController

    botonCriar - Variable in class controller.CrianzaController

    botonEntrenamientoPesado - Variable in class controller.EntrenamientoController
     
    botones - Variable in class controller.MainController
     
    botonesActivos - Variable in class controller.MainController
     
    botonNegro - Variable in class controller.CasinoRuletaController
     
    botonRojo - Variable in class controller.CasinoRuletaController
     
    botonSalir - Variable in class controller.CapturaController
     
    botonSalir - Variable in class controller.CrianzaController
     
    botonSalir - Variable in class controller.EntrenamientoController
     
    botonSalirEleccionCombate - Variable in class controller.SeleccionCombateController
     
    btnCerrarSeleccion - Variable in class controller.CrianzaController
     
    btnReiniciar - Variable in class controller.CasinoNumeroController
     
    buscarPorId(int) - Method in interface dao.IMovimientoDAO
